title: Livno, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Livno, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Livno is a city in Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina with a population of 34,000. A city in western Bosnia on the Livno Field plateau, known for its cheese production, the Franciscan monastery, and the nearby Buško Lake.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
